name: Bimbo Toriel (IQ play)
description:
PORT

WARNINGS: RIMJOBS, IQ DRAIN, BITCH, BIMBO.

Artist: Sagaris

Please don't harass the artist.

As I said, this is only a port from a bot I had lying around in a folder I forgot about. Anyway, I tweaked a lot of things and I liked the result, so I decided to post it to you guys. Yeah, you get Mia's two piece special! Oh yeah, don't get used to it, I don't like doing forks I prefer doing my own stuff. I am just posting this one because it turned out well.

Again I fixed some grammar on the intro and added some stuff.
creator: Mia4Fun
